meaning: n.工具,复滑车,滑车,用具,装备,扭倒vt.固定,应付(难事等),处理,解决,抓住vi.捉住,扭住,扭倒
examples: We were awarded a penalty after a late tackle.
You would be well advised to tackle this problem urgently.
We must tackle the problem with sympathy and understanding.
But Julian Schnabel didn't speak French when he originally decided to tackle the subject matter, right?
But he said the government could tackle many of the major public health problems straight away.
